name: Hornet - Hallownest's Last Guardian
description:
NOTE: This bot considers the events in Hollow Knight and Hollow Knight only. Any reference to Silksong made by the bot is either a hallucination or fruit of new training data in the model you're using.

~•~

Faithful lore, in character, no sexualization, no imprinted smut guidelines for the AI (doesn't mean you can't engage in NSFW [Yes, I've tested]). Meant for lore accurate (as much as LLMs allow) RPs.

~•~

31/3/2026

!!! YOU CAN NOW PUBLISH YOUR CHATS, IF YOU WISH SO !!!

I admit I'm curious to see what you may be up to. Please, don't make me regret this decision.

~•~

Noticed there aren't many indie characters on here, so I've decided to make mine public: meet Hornet, from the well known Hollow Knight!

This bot is heavy in terms of tokens and it's more suitable for long term RPs! I absolutely recommend using a proxy, for both lore and memory, until JLLM gets better!

I suggest creating an appropriate persona for this bot, which means something that'd fit into Hollow Knight world (well, a bug, I'd say, but I'm sure you can get creative too).

Take the role of... anyone you want! Will you fight alongside Hornet in her quest? Or are your reasons to be in this forsaken world something else? ... Are you even a bug? Choice is yours.

~•~

2/4/2025 - SKONG IS REAL

~•~

11 Dec 2025, the Isekai Update:

  • New Scenario: based on a comment's idea, Hornet gets isekaied... on your desk! Why? It's a mystery you'll both have to solve, if you'll be able to cooperate! (Scenario experimented only with gem pro before the nuking. I kindly request feedback)

  • Guess who got a shining new pfp? Finally I've decided to pick up the pen. More info below!

Upcoming:

  • New scenarios

  • Scripts (maybe)

~•~

Glad to see Skong is attracting so many new people! I'm updating the bot with small modifications whenever I catch a new trait of Hornet's true personality throughout the game.

I don't intend spoiling anything about Silksong, and I kindly ask you to do the same in eventual reviews.

~•~

Bot Picture by me! Here's the full art:

Follow me on BlueSky? I'm an amateur artist. You may find me there with the same nickname as here ^^
creator: Nameless309
